subject: us_equity_portfolio
thesis: AI infrastructure remains a tactical overweight theme, but the portfolio already has FLEX starter exposure and several AI-chain holdings. Current candidates did not pass fee-adjusted risk/reward, stop, data-quality, and Hades audit requirements for a new current trade.
roundtable_summary: Buffett, Zeus, Poseidon, and Hades agreed to make no current BUY or SELL. FLEX is already held and has turned into a small unrealized loss but has not breached the 135.10 risk line. MU, WDC, STX, AMD, VRT, INTC, DELL, ANET, SMH, SOXX, and QQQ did not pass current-trade review.
final_decision_english: Final decision: no current buy and no current sell. Keep existing positions unchanged. No trade fees are incurred. Continue monitoring FLEX against the 135.10 risk line and restart the analysis on 2026-05-12 22:30 Beijing time, or earlier if price action invalidates the current snapshot.

expected_outcome_json.review_trigger: Restart analysis on 2026-05-12 22:30 Beijing time, or earlier if FLEX breaches 135.10 or if broker real-time quotes materially diverge from the financeBusiness snapshot.

review_summary: Prior local record was treated as noncompliant background because it lacked local_result_snapshot.json and contained db_record.json. The current base_short.md includes FLEX 11 shares at 142.82 average cost, so this round treated FLEX as an existing holding and focused on post-starter risk discipline.
